/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/cpp_tests/test_attention.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/cpp_tests/test_memory_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/cpp_tests/test_scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/cpp_tests/test_engine.cpp.o -o run_tests  libllm_lv1_lib.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
